svg.title: Mermaid rect highlighting
svg.desc: Demonstrates Mermaid rect highlighting mapped onto sequencer fragments with inferred actor spans. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/14-rect-highlighting/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/14-rect-highlighting
svg.text: Demonstrates Mermaid rect highlighting mapped onto sequencer fragments with inferred actor spans.
From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with:
Highlighted cache phase [Mermaid: Note over Service,Cache: Highlighted cache phase]
